name: agent-skills-marketplace
description: A curated collection of Claude Code skills and plugins for developers

plugins.name: sdlc-workflow
plugins.description: Two commands — `/wf` (the single SDLC entry point) and `/review` — driving a 10-stage lifecycle from intake through retro, with per-slice artifacts, runtime-truth verification, and PO-confirmed stack fingerprinting. Navigation, ship-plan, and docs are `/wf` keys; design folds into `/wf design`; quick/standalone flows are `/wf intake` modes plus the `/wf probe` and `/wf simplify` keys.
